pi_items.source: Verified in /workspace/data/ecommerce-monolith directory structure and setup_task.sh
Verified in setup_task.sh which copies the monolith to this path during task initialization
Verified in export_result.sh and README.md as the expected target location

Verified by direct file inspection: All 4 classes exist in /workspace/data/ecommerce-monolith/src/main/java/com/example/ecommerce/model/
Verified by direct file inspection: All 3 repository classes exist in /workspace/data/ecommerce-monolith/src/main/java/com/example/ecommerce/repository/
Verified by direct file inspection: All 3 service classes exist in /workspace/data/ecommerce-monolith/src/main/java/com/example/ecommerce/service/

privileged_info_summary: The source ecommerce-monolith project is a single-module Maven application (groupId: com.example, version: 1.0-SNAPSHOT) containing 4 model classes (Product, Customer, Order, OrderItem) in the model package, 3 repository classes (ProductRepository, CustomerRepository, OrderRepository) in the repository package, and 3 service classes (ProductService, CustomerService, OrderService) in the service package, all under com.example.ecommerce namespace. The task requires decomposing this monolith into a multi-module Maven structure with three child modules: ecommerce-api (models), ecommerce-persistence (repositories depending on ecommerce-api), and ecommerce-service (services depending on both ecommerce-api and ecommerce-persistence), with parent POM at /home/ga/ecommerce-refactored.
